possible_dialog: My lawn needs to be mowed today but I don't think my back can handle it...
My husband Harold is away and I need help with the lawn.
I see you saw my post on the job board, well then, be good to Fluffy and don't be a hooligan!
Come closer, I can't see you! Oh, you're here to mow my lawn.
reject_dialog: Sorry, I don't think my lawn needs to be mowed today. Would you like one of my freshly baked cookies instead?
unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
The rabbit in the front yard is glaring at you.
first_dialog: Who is it? Come closer, I can't see you clearly!
Oh, yes, of course! These old bones aren't what they used to be... You're such a kind young man helping out an old lady like me.
Just to let you know, my rabbit Fluffy lives in the backyard, he might look mean but he wouldn't hurt a soul! I know he's a breed of killer rabbit but he's harmless and such a sweetheart.
I wouldn't know what I'd do without him, he always keeps me company whenever my husband Harold is away.
player_dialog: Do you need help mowing your lawn?
first_job_offer: Now, I nearly forgot, my lawn needs to be mowed today.
